description: A comprehensive dashboard displaying the results of the AI resume analysis, broken down into 3 tabs: Overview, ATS Scoring, and Detailed Improvements.

layout.structure: 12-column grid layout (max-w-7xl). Sidebar takes up 3 cols (resume info + tabs). Main content takes up 9 cols.
layout.navigation: Sticky top glassmorphism navbar (bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-md) with back button to dashboard and a History button.

typography.body: font-sans (Inter), regular, medium, and bold weights

semantic.warning: amber-500 (used for AI suggestions, action verbs, missing sections)
semantic.danger: red-500 (used for weaknesses, missing keywords, formatting issues)
semantic.info: blue-500 (used for ATS scoring, quantified achievements)

sidebar_card.classes: bg-card border border-border p-6 rounded-[2rem] shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden
sidebar_card.design_notes: Displays uploaded file name, target role badge, and status. Contains a 'View Document' button.

navigation_tabs.container: bg-card border border-border p-3 rounded-[2rem] shadow-sm flex flex-col gap-2
navigation_tabs.button_base: justify-start gap-3 h-14 px-5 rounded-xl text-base font-semibold transition-all
navigation_tabs.active_state: shadow-md with colored backgrounds (primary for overview, blue for ATS, amber for improvements)
navigation_tabs.icon_wrapper: p-1.5 rounded-lg bg-white/20 or bg-[color]/10 depending on active state
navigation_tabs.design_notes: Vertical pill-shaped tabs that distinctly change color based on the selected section.

main_content_cards.classes: bg-card border border-border p-8 md:p-10 rounded-[2rem] shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden
main_content_cards.design_notes: All main content blocks use consistent large border radii. Most contain a subtle absolute positioned background blur for depth (e.g., 'absolute top-0 right-0 w-64 h-64 bg-[color]/5 rounded-full blur-3xl -z-10').

donut_chart.design_notes: Custom SVG donut chart. Stroke color changes based on score (>=80 green, >=60 yellow, <60 red). Central text displays percentage. Includes a subtle blurred drop shadow behind the SVG circle.

tab_1_overview.hero_card: Contains the Donut Chart left aligned, and text ('Good Match!') right aligned. Includes action buttons to jump to other tabs.
tab_1_overview.lists: Strengths (emerald) and Weaknesses (red) displayed in side-by-side cards. Uses colored dots as bullet points.
tab_1_overview.ai_suggestions: Rendered as individual bordered blocks with a numeric badge on the left.

tab_2_ats_scoring.on_demand_state: Initial view shows a large CTA button ('Calculate ATS Score') centered in a tall card. Uses a spinning radar icon while loading.
tab_2_ats_scoring.breakdown_card: Shows total score donut chart alongside 3 horizontal progress bars (Format, Keyword, Sections). Bars use gradient backgrounds and a subtle skew glare effect.
tab_2_ats_scoring.keyword_badges: Matched (emerald background/text) and Missing (red background/text) keywords displayed as flex-wrap pill tags.

tab_3_detailed_improvements.on_demand_state: Similar to ATS tab, requires user click to generate.
tab_3_detailed_improvements.action_verbs: Shows 'weak verb' crossed out (line-through decoration-red-500/50) with an arrow pointing to the 'strong verb' in an emerald box.
tab_3_detailed_improvements.quantified_achievements: List of items with a blue numeric badge.
tab_3_detailed_improvements.missing_sections: Pill tags inside a card, with a subtle informational banner underneath.
